name: qit_szilard_record_companion
classification_note: Finite two-qubit companion row for Szilard record lifetime, record decay, and reset-strength mechanics. It stays in exact density-operator bookkeeping and is meant for QIT-aligned comparison, not canonical admission.

summary.scope_note: QIT-aligned finite two-qubit companion row for record lifetime, record decay, and reset strength. It separates ordered, scrambled, and repair-oriented protocols without promoting the row to canonical status.
